leadText: Apple Acid (Japanese: りんごさん Malic Acid) is a damage-dealing Grass-type move introduced in Generation VIII. It is the signature move of Appletun.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Apple Acid inflicts damage and lowers the target's Special Defense stat by one stage. Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Brilliant Diamond and Shining Pearl [ edit | edit source ] Apple Acid cannot be selected in a battle.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh LA S V The user attacks the target with an acidic liquid created from tart apples. This also lowers the target's Sp. Def stat. BD SP This move can’t be used. It’s recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can’t be remembered.
